opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
Guatemala, March 29, 1900.

div.p: (Mr. Hunter reports that the Guatemalan Government replies, in connection with Department’s cablegram of the 28th instant, that Minister Arriaga has full power to grant the requested extension.
The Guatemalan Government, on the 22d instant, furnished the legation with a copy of its memorial, which was acknowledged on the 24th instant.
British minister has been furnished with Department’s cable instruction.)
